findings.issue: Landing page conversion is not optimized as the sample AURA profile is not visible without login
findings.recommended_fix: Add a 'See a sample AURA profile' link on the landing page that shows a fictional profile without requiring login

findings.issue: Share mechanics to LinkedIn/Instagram are not implemented
findings.recommended_fix: Implement share buttons for LinkedIn and Instagram

findings.issue: Inviting a friend does not give crystals
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a referral system that rewards users with crystals for inviting friends
Set meta tags for all pages

findings.issue: Telegram groups, Instagram reels, YouTube shorts are not utilized
findings.recommended_fix: Utilize AZ-specific channels for marketing and user engagement
